name: About Us
description:
COMING BRO

We represent the spirit of an Indian youth, committed to make a positive impact by tackling unemployment and improving transportation access across the underserved places of India. Through "COMING BRO" we have made a bold move to extend the financial assistance to numerous individuals and tackling their transportation needs with swift and straightforward solution.

name: privacy policy
description:
Privacy Policy 

This Privacy Policy applies to the COMING BRO software and mobile application. It is an electronic agreement formed under the Information Technology Act, 2000, along with applicable rules and amendments. This privacy policy constitutes a legally binding document between you (the user) and COMING BRO. By using the COMING BRO software or application, you agree to the terms of this policy, which will govern the relationship between you and COMING BRO for all usages of the application or software.

 

Information Collected and Use of Information 

This Privacy Policy applies to the COMING BRO software and mobile application. It is an electronic agreement formed under the Information Technology Act, 2000, along with applicable rules and amendments. This privacy policy constitutes a legally binding document between you (the user) and COMING BRO. By using the COMING BRO software or application, you agree to the terms of this policy, which will govern the relationship between you and COMING BRO for all usages of the application or software.

 


Retention
 

COMING BRO retains all information collected as long as permitted by applicable law. You may request deletion of your account at any time, though COMING BRO may retain certain data after deletion requests due to legal or regulatory requirements, safety, security, or fraud prevention needs, or if issues like outstanding credits or unresolved claims exist.


Rights
 

You have the right to access your profile on the platform to add, remove, or modify information as needed. COMING BRO will use updated information upon modification. However, prior uses of previous information will not be affected, and users are expected to provide accurate and truthful information. 

 

Data Security 

COMING BRO is committed to maintaining data confidentiality and security, utilizing organizational and technical measures in compliance with applicable laws. Data is encrypted during transit and while at rest.

 

Grievance 

For questions, complaints, or concerns regarding information processing or this Privacy Policy, you may reach out to COMING BRO’s designated grievance officer:


Grievance Officer

Cob Technology

Address: Irani Road, Dahanu, Tal Palghar, Dist Palghar

Email: support@comingbro.in

Phone: +91-9823203222

 

Updates

COMING BRO may occasionally update this Privacy Policy. If significant changes are made, users will be notified in advance via email or through the application. Continued use of our services after such updates constitutes consent to the updated notice as permitted by law. We encourage users to review this notice periodically to stay informed of our privacy practices.
